name: Hero Banner with Parallax
description: Full-width hero with a parallax background image, a gradient overlay, and an animated heading. Suitable as a landing-page opener.

name: Three-Column Feature Grid
description: A trio of feature cards with icons, headings, and short copy. Designed to sit below the hero and summarise key benefits.

name: Pricing Table
description: Three-tier pricing with a recommended plan, monthly/annual toggle, and per-plan feature lists.
